# CWE-605: listener enables SO_REUSEADDR allowing port hijack on restart.
lang: go
file: CWE-605-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ServeMetrics(r *gin.Engine) error {
	lc := net.ListenConfig{
		Control: func(network, address string, c syscall.RawConn) error {
			return c.Control(func(fd uintptr) {
				_ = syscall.SetsockoptInt(int(fd), syscall.SOL_SOCKET, syscall.SO_REUSEADDR, 1)
			})
		},
	}
	ln, err := lc.Listen(nil, "tcp", ":9090")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return r.RunListener(ln)
}
